items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Puzzle Edge Handbag Latest version with adjustable strap
Fennel Green
Lo*we🔥's debut tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of satin calfskin with cage-stitched edges🌟
The mini Puzzle can hold, for example, a small vertical wallet, most size phones (max 6.1 inches), and sunglasses case. Shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable, detachable strap*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
Model:3000b

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Model 1763 Return
Mini Glossy Calfskin Puzzle FoldMini
The Puzzle Fold bag draws inspiration from the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series, reinterpreting them with geometrically rich architectural patches that can fold completely, making it a great travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight bag paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo. This mini version is crafted from glossy calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Suede lining
LOEWE hot stamping
16.5-9-20

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
NEW IN l
Large Goya Silk Calfskin Handbag
7 Colors
Model 5608
Size 22.5-16.5-6.5
Goya is a structured compact bag, very well organized for its size. The clean Anagram closure and vibrant colors contrast sharply with its sharp graphic minimalism. It is handcrafted from exquisite silk calfskin with a soft Nappa sheepskin lining. It is a testament to exquisite craftsmanship and a new LOEWE product worth buying.
Shoulder carry
Adjustable strap
Magnetic closure
Four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket
One exterior pocket
Calfskin lining
Metal-embossed LOEWE logo on the strap

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Moss green Model 332
Medium soft calfskin Pebble Bucket Tote
Pebble cleverly blends pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design, creating a unique and innovative bag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and function, features an adjustable shoulder strap and fits various carrying ways, and the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. This medium version is made of soft calfskin.
Shoulder or crossbody
Adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic closure
Interior pocket
Synthetic leather lining
Anagram engraved pebble
Size: 24.5*23.5*28cm

items.name_cn: Three-color collection~

specs.rawTitle: Three-color collection~

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
SERPENTI FOREVER Medium Tote, made of calf leather with sheepskin lining. It skillfully blends classic design with modern style, fully showcasing the endless charm of the collection. This easy-to-wear bag incorporates new details into iconic elements, featuring a leather shoulder strap and a signature snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It features a compartment, a front pocket, an external back zip pocket, an internal open pocket, and a mirror pouch with a customizable mirror. The back is adorned with a BVLGARI metal logo.
Style: 293665
Size: 20.5 X 15 X 9

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
SERPENTI FOREVER Mini Tote, crafted from calfskin, combining a modern look with practical wearability for a stylish look. The piece features a serpent chain and leather shoulder strap, accented with the iconic serpent head magnetic clasp, drawing inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It is equipped with a compartment, a front pocket, an external back patch pocket, an internal open pocket, and an internal mirror pouch with a customizable vanity mirror, with a BVLGARI metal logo on the back.
Style: 293666
Size: 19 X 11 X 6
